name: Mr. Food's Easy Wonton Soup- 1/23/96
recipeIngredient: 1 package won-ton wrappers (6oz), cut into 1/2-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a soup pot, brown the pork over medium-high heat for 3 to 5 minutes, or until no pink remains. Drain off any excess liquid.
2. Reduce the heat to medium and add the remaining ingredients except the wonton strips; bring to a boil.
3. Separate the wonton strips and stir them into the soup.
4. Cook for 8 to 10 more minutes, or until the wonton strips are cooked.
